source: ApprovalPrep v4.3.0 runtime product admin seed

products.name: Letter of Explanation Kit
products.shortDescription: One $39 downloadable kit with 9 explanation-letter templates in PDF and editable DOCX formats.
products.longDescription: Pay $39 once and download the Letter of Explanation Kit. The kit includes a PDF guide and editable DOCX templates covering 9 explanation-letter situations: credit explanation, income gap, employment gap, address history, rental issue, late payment, bank statement, life event, and general application explanation. The free Studio is optional and not required to buy or use the kit. ApprovalPrep does not contact anyone for you, repair credit, give legal advice, create fake documents, or promise approval. This is a direct paid download: after checkout, the buyer unlocks the PDF guide and editable DOCX file for this kit. The free Studio is optional and not required.
includes: editable DOCX templates for 9 explanation-letter situations

products.name: Income + Employment Letter Kit
products.shortDescription: You need to explain work, income, job changes, or employment gaps.
products.longDescription: Prepare self-service letters that explain your work and income clearly. This kit includes templates and guides for employment verification, proof of income, self-employment income, job changes, employment gaps, and bank statement explanations. You fill in the letters yourself and attach real documents if needed. ApprovalPrep does not contact employers, verify employment for you, create fake income papers, give financial advice, or promise approval. This is a direct paid download: after checkout, the buyer unlocks the PDF guide and editable DOCX file for this kit. The free Studio is optional and not required.

products.name: Credit Letter Kit
products.shortDescription: You want to prepare your own credit letters and follow-up steps.
products.longDescription: Prepare your own self-service credit letters and checklists. This kit helps you write clear letters for possible credit report errors, late payments, goodwill requests, debt validation, and follow-up steps. You write and send the letters yourself. ApprovalPrep does not repair credit for you, contact credit bureaus for you, remove accurate items, contact creditors, give legal advice, or promise any result. This is a direct paid download: after checkout, the buyer unlocks the PDF guide and editable DOCX file for this kit. The free Studio is optional and not required.

products.name: Rental Application Kit
products.shortDescription: You want your rental papers organized before you apply.
products.longDescription: Get your rental application papers organized before you apply. This self-service kit includes checklists, letter guidance, and document prep support to help you explain your situation clearly and keep your packet complete. Use it for apartment applications, rental history questions, income questions, employment details, landlord follow-up, and supporting document prep. You prepare and send your own materials. ApprovalPrep does not contact landlords, repair credit, create fake documents, act as your agent, or promise approval. This is a direct paid download: after checkout, the buyer unlocks the PDF guide and editable DOCX file for this kit. The free Studio is optional and not required.

products.name: Loan Prep Letter Kit
products.shortDescription: You need to explain documents before a loan or financing review.
products.longDescription: Prepare letters and checklists before a loan or financing review. This self-service kit helps you explain credit history, income, job changes, bank statement questions, and other application details in a clear way. Use it for auto loans, personal loans, mortgage prep, or other financing situations where you need to explain your documents. ApprovalPrep is not a lender, broker, credit repair company, law firm, or financial advisor. We do not contact lenders for you or promise approval. This is a direct paid download: after checkout, the buyer unlocks the PDF guide and editable DOCX file for this kit. The free Studio is optional and not required.

products.name: Business Funding Prep Kit

products.longDescription: Prepare self-service letters and checklists for business funding or lender review. This kit helps you organize business documents, explain income, explain bank activity, describe use of funds, and prepare follow-up letters. Use it for business loan prep, SBA prep, lender questions, or business document readiness. ApprovalPrep is not a lender, broker, law firm, accountant, or financial advisor. We do not contact lenders for you, create fake documents, or promise funding. This is a direct paid download: after checkout, the buyer unlocks the PDF guide and editable DOCX file for this kit. The free Studio is optional and not required.

products.name: Life Admin Letter Kit
products.shortDescription: You need simple letters or checklists for everyday paperwork problems.
products.longDescription: Prepare simple letters and checklists for everyday paperwork problems. This self-service kit helps you explain address history, residency, identity details, account issues, document requests, and other life-admin situations. Use it when you need a clear letter or checklist before sending documents to a school, employer, landlord, agency, company, or other office. ApprovalPrep does not contact anyone for you, give legal advice, create fake documents, or promise any result. This is a direct paid download: after checkout, the buyer unlocks the PDF guide and editable DOCX file for this kit. The free Studio is optional and not required.

products.name: Complete ApprovalPrep Bundle
products.shortDescription: You want the full self-service ApprovalPrep library instead of buying one kit at a time.

This includes letters, guides, and checklists for rental applications, credit questions, income and employment proof, loan prep, business funding prep, and everyday paperwork issues.
